name: Biofermin Pharmaceutical Co., Ltd.
summary: Biofermin Pharmaceutical Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells drugs and quasi-drugs in Japan. It offers drugs for the treatment of diarrhea, constipation, and stomach digestion; and veterinary medicines, pesticides and other chemicals, cosmetics, medical equipment, foods, beverages, food additives, feeds, feed additives, and various tests. The company was formerly known as Kobe hygiene Laboratory Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Biofermin Pharmaceutical Co., Ltd. in March 1949. The company was founded in 1917 and is headquartered in Kobe, Japan. Biofermin Pharmaceutical Co., Ltd. is a subsidiary of Taisho Pharmaceutical Co., Ltd.
